in: Ultimate Weapons in Final Fantasy VII Ever Crisis, Weapon lists

Ultimate Weapons (Ever Crisis)

Sign In to Save Save Edit
  • Edit source
  • History
  • Purge
  • Talk (0)

Ultimate Weapons (アルティメット武器, Arutimetto Buki?) are a special type of weapon in Final Fantasy VII Ever Crisis. They are equipped in an exclusive weapon slot, separate from the regular weapon slot, allowing the use of Ultimate Command Abilities (U. C. Abilities) (アルティメットコマンドアビリティ(UCアビリティ), Arutimetto Komando Abiriti (UC Abiriti)?) unique to each Ultimate Weapon.

These weapons can be obtained through exclusive Draws or Exchanges. They can be exchanged for Mako Gems, collected from Draws, or for Ultimate Medals, which are event rewards. The odds of obtaining any Ultimate Weapon from a draw are less than 1%, unless the weapon is featured in a given month.

Ultimate Weapons have a ★★★★★★ rarity, and while their rarity cannot be upgraded, it is possible to level them up and apply Brands.

See also: Ultimate weapon (term)

Contents

  • 1 List of Ultimate Weapons
    • 1.1 Cloud
    • 1.2 Barret
    • 1.3 Tifa
    • 1.4 Aerith
    • 1.5 Red XIII
    • 1.6 Yuffie
    • 1.7 Cait Sith
    • 1.8 Vincent
    • 1.9 Cid
    • 1.10 Zack
    • 1.11 Sephiroth
    • 1.12 Glenn
    • 1.13 Matt
    • 1.14 Lucia
    • 1.15 Angeal
    • 1.16 Sephiroth (Original)

List of Ultimate Weapons[]

Stats shown are for Ultimate Weapons at Lv. 140.

Cloud[]

Ultimate Weapon PATK MATK HEAL U. C. Ability Charge Uses Reinforcement Abilities
Ultimate Buster Sword
 198 198 147 Ult. Braver:
Deal 1,000% Phys./Mag. Non-elem. damage [Rng.: Single Enemy].
Also, PATK is decreased. [Pot.: High] [Rng.: Single Enemy] [Dur.: 30s]. [Ext.: +30s] [Max. pot.: High]
MATK is decreased. [Pot.: High] [Rng.: Single Enemy] [Dur.: 30s]. [Ext.: +30s] [Max. pot.: High] 		30s 1 Boost Ability Pot. +24 pts
Boost PDEF +20 pts
Ragnarok
 232 229 142 Heaven's Twilight:
Deal 2,000% Phys./Mag. Non-elem. damage [Rng.: Single Enemy].
Also, Applies Amp. Phys. Abilities [Rng.: Self] [Next Phys. C./UC. Ability: Dmg. +40%] [Dur.: 60s] [Ext.: +0s].
Applies Amp. Mag. Abilities [Rng.: Self] [Next Mag. C./UC. Ability: Dmg. +40%] [Dur.: 60s] [Ext.: +0s].
+3 ATB Gauge [Rng.: All Allies]. 		60s (Initial: 20s) 2 Boost Ability Pot. +24 pts
Attack Boost (All Allies) +25 pts

Barret[]

Ultimate Weapon PATK MATK HEAL U. C. Ability Charge Uses Reinforcement Abilities
Ultimate Gatling Gun
 195 201 148 Ult. Agitation:
PDEF is increased. [Pot.: High] [Rng.: All Allies] [Dur.: 20s]. [Ext.: +20s] [Max. pot.: High]
Also, Phys. heal is cast. [Pot.: 5% of Healing Pot.] [Rng.: All Allies] 		30s 1 Boost PDEF +24 pts
Boost HP +20 pts
Missing Score
 225 220 155 Guardian Aura:
Physical Resistance is increased. [Pot.: +50%] [Rng.: All Allies] [Dur.: 15s] [Ext.: +0s]
Also, Magic Resistance is increased. [Pot.: +50%] [Rng.: All Allies] [Dur.: 15s] [Ext.: +0s]
Mag. heal is cast. [Pot.: 5% of Healing Pot.] [Rng.: All Allies] 		60s (Initial: 20s) 2 Boost MDEF +24 pts
Enhanced Interruption (Veil) +25 pts

Tifa[]

Ultimate Weapon PATK MATK HEAL U. C. Ability Charge Uses Reinforcement Abilities
Ultimate Leather Gloves
 206 201 139 Tornado Shot:
Deal 1,000% Phys./Mag. Non-elem. damage [Rng.: Single Enemy].
Also, PATK is increased. [Pot.: Mid] [Rng.: All Allies] [Dur.: 30s]. [Ext.: +30s] [Max. pot.: Mid]
MATK is increased. [Pot.: Mid] [Rng.: All Allies] [Dur.: 30s]. [Ext.: +30s] [Max. pot.: Mid] 		30s 1 Boost Ability Pot. +24 pts
Boost MDEF +20 pts
Premium Heart
 236 228 140 Ravaging Axe Kick:
Deal 2,000% Phys./Mag. Non-elem. damage [Rng.: Single Enemy].
Also, Haste is applied [Rng.: Self]. [Dur.: 30s] [Ext.: +30s] 		50s (Initial: 15s) 3 Boost Ability Pot. +24 pts
Attack Boost +25 pts
Dragon Claw
 240 240 127 Dragon Momentum:
Deal 2,000% Phys./Mag. Non-elem. damage [Rng.: Single Enemy].
Also, Applies Phys. weapon boost: C./U.C. ability damage + 60% [Rng.: Self] [Dur.: 30s] [Ext.: +30s]
Applies Mag. weapon boost: C./U.C. ability damage + 60% [Rng.: Self] [Dur.: 30s] [Ext.: +30s]
Haste is applied [Rng.: All Allies]. [Dur.: 20s] [Ext.: +20s] 		60s (Initial: 0s) 2 Boost Elem. Pot. Arcanum (All Allies) +45 pts
Interruption for ATB Conservation +25 pts

Aerith[]

Ultimate Weapon PATK MATK HEAL U. C. Ability Charge Uses Reinforcement Abilities
Ultimate Guard Stick
 177 181 178 Fos Temenos:
Mag. heal is cast. [Pot.: 50% of Healing Pot.] [Rng.: All Allies]
Also, Regen is applied [Rng.: All Allies]. [Dur.: 4s] [Ext.: +3s]
Removes Phys. Attack Down, Mag. Attack Down [Rng.: All Allies]. 		40s 1 Boost HEAL +24 pts
Boost MDEF +20 pts
Princess Guard
 195 185 208 Jubilation:
Restores 30% of max HP [Mag.] [Rng.: All Allies].
Also, +3 ATB Gauge [Rng.: All Allies]. 		60s (Initial: 20s) 2 Boost HEAL +24 pts
Regen Boost +25 pts
Abraxas
 193 198 197 Viridian Torrent:
Deal 1,000% Phys./Mag. Non-elem. damage [Rng.: All Enemies].
Also, Applied Stats Debuff Tier is increased. [Pot.: Mid] [Rng.: All Enemies] [Dur.: +30s] [Max. Tier: Extra High]
Haste is applied [Rng.: All Allies]. [Dur.: 20s] [Ext.: +20s] 		60s (Initial: 0s) 2 Boost HP Arcanum (All Allies) +45 pts
Reprieve Arcanum (All Allies) +25 pts

Red XIII[]

Ultimate Weapon PATK MATK HEAL U. C. Ability Charge Uses Reinforcement Abilities
Ultimate Leather Collar
 185 185 169 Ult. Therapeutic Touch:
Mag. heal is cast. [Pot.: 27% of Healing Pot.] [Rng.: All Allies]
Also, Regen is applied [Rng.: All Allies]. [Dur.: 12s] [Ext.: +12s] 		40s 1 Boost HEAL +24 pts
Boost PDEF +20 pts
Limited Moon
 192 188 209 Entelechial Echo:
Mag. heal is cast. [Pot.: 110% of Healing Pot.] [Rng.: All Allies]
Also, Applies Exploit Weakness [Rng.: All Allies] [Pot. 40%] [Dur.: 60s] [Ext.: +60s]. 		60s (Initial: 20s) 2 Boost HEAL +24 pts
Interruption Arcanum (All Allies) +25 pts

Also, PATK is increased. [Pot.: High] [Rng.: Self] [Dur.: 30s]. [Ext.: +30s] [Max. pot.: High]

Also, PDEF is decreased. [Pot.: High] [Rng.: Single Enemy] [Dur.: 30s]. [Ext.: +30s] [Max. pot.: High]
MDEF is decreased. [Pot.: High] [Rng.: Single Enemy] [Dur.: 30s]. [Ext.: +30s] [Max. pot.: High]
+7 ATB Gauge [Rng.: Self]. 		60s (Initial: 20s) 2 Boost Ability Pot. +24 pts

 197 188 157 Super Spirit:
Increases Limit Gauge [Pot.: 30%] [Rng.: Single Ally].
Also, Mag. heal is cast. [Pot.: 5% of Healing Pot.] [Rng.: Single Ally] 		30s 1 Buff/Debuff Extension (Stats/Pot./Res.) +24 pts
Boost PDEF +20 pts

Fomalhaut
 242 232 133 Bestial Burst:
Deal 2,000% Phys./Mag. Non-elem. damage [Rng.: Single Enemy].
Also, Applies Phys. Damage Bonus [Effect: When using Phys. ability, deal bonus damage equal to 40% of damage dealt] [Rng.: Self] [Dur.: 90s] [Ext.: +90s]
Applies Mag. Damage Bonus [Effect: When using Mag. ability, deal bonus damage equal to 40% of damage dealt] [Rng.: Self] [Dur.: 90s] [Ext.: +90s]
Haste is applied [Rng.: All Allies]. [Dur.: 20s] [Ext.: +20s]
Increases Limit Gauge 100% [Rng.: Self]. 		60s (Initial: 0s) 2 Boost Elem. Pot. Arcanum (All Allies) +45 pts
Weapon Boost for Interruption (All Allies) +25 pts

Applies Mag. ATB Conservation Effect [Rng.: Self] [Mag. Weapon/Gear C. Ability ATB Cost: -1] [Dur.: 30s] [Ext.: +30s]
+3 ATB Gauge [Rng.: All Allies]. 		50s (Initial: 0s) 3 Boost Elem. Pot. Arcanum (All Allies) +45 pts

Also, Provoke is applied [Rng.: Self]. [Dur.: 60s] [Ext.: +60s]
Physical Resistance is increased. [Pot.: +50%] [Rng.: Self] [Dur.: 30s] [Ext.: +0s]

Ultimate Weapon PATK MATK HEAL U. C. Ability Charge Uses Reinforcement Abilities
Ultimate Broadsword: Axis

Restores 25% of max HP [Mag.] [Rng.: All Allies].
Also, Regen is applied [Rng.: All Allies]. [Dur.: 4s] [Ext.: +3s]
Removes Phys. Defense Down, Mag. Defense Down [Rng.: All Allies]. 		40s 1 Boost HEAL +24 pts
Boost MDEF +20 pts

Also, Haste is applied [Rng.: All Allies]. [Dur.: 15s] [Ext.: +15s]
Applies Amp. Healing Abilities [Rng.: Self] [Next C./UC. Ability: Healing +50%] [Dur.: 60s] [Ext.: +0s]. 		60s (Initial: 20s) 2 Boost HEAL +24 pts
ATB Boost (All Allies) +25 pts

Ultimate Weapon PATK MATK HEAL U. C. Ability Charge Uses Reinforcement Abilities
Ultimate V39
 189 189 163 Boost Volley:
PATK is increased. [Pot.: High] [Rng.: Single Ally] [Dur.: 30s]. [Ext.: +30s] [Max. pot.: High]

Mag. heal is cast. [Pot.: 5% of Healing Pot.] [Rng.: Single Ally] 		30s 1 Buff/Debuff Extension (Stats/Pot./Res.) +24 pts
Boost PDEF +20 pts
Aldebaran
 228 224 149 Triple Split Shot:
Deal 2,000% Phys./Mag. Non-elem. damage [Rng.: Single Enemy].
Also, Applies HP Gain [Rng.: All Allies] [Dur.: 50s] [Ext.: +50s] [When triggered: restores 10% of target's max HP].
Applies Amp. Phys. Abilities [Rng.: All Allies] [Next Phys. C./UC. Ability: Dmg. +30%] [Dur.: 50s] [Ext.: +0s].
Applies Amp. Mag. Abilities [Rng.: All Allies] [Next Mag. C./UC. Ability: Dmg. +30%] [Dur.: 50s] [Ext.: +0s]. 		50s (Initial: 15s) 3 Buff/Debuff Extension (Stats/Pot./Res.) +24 pts
Haste Boost +25 pts
Total Eclipse
 242 242 124 Radiant Force:
Deal 2,000% Phys./Mag. Non-elem. damage [Rng.: All Enemies].
Also, Increases overspeed gauge [Pot.: 50%] [Rng.: All Allies] (Not applied while overspeed is active)
Haste is applied [Rng.: All Allies]. [Dur.: 20s] [Ext.: +20s] 		60s (Initial:0s) 2 Buff/Debuff Extension Arcanum (All Allies) +45 pts
Enliven Boost (All Allies) +25 pts

Ultimate Weapon PATK MATK HEAL U. C. Ability Charge Uses Reinforcement Abilities
Ultimate Type-90 Longsword

Veil [Pot.: 50% of max HP of the affected] is applied [Rng.: Self]. [Dur.: 60s] [Ext.: +12s] 		50s (Initial: 15s) 3 Boost PDEF +24 pts

Final Fantasy VII Ever Crisis
Content Artwork - Translations
Adapted Stories Final Fantasy VII - Crisis Core - The First Soldier (Episode I - Episode II) - Advent Children - Dirge of Cerberus
Locations Banora - Cawpine Cavern - Chocobo Farm - Fort Tamblin - Grastia Path - La'paina Coast - Logues Ruins - Midgar - Midgar Slums - Modeoheim - Nibelheim - Padapili Sea Cave - Rhadore Archipelago - Shinra Building - Sijad - Sunsin Cave - Wall Market - Wutai
GameplayFeatures Characters - Events - Battle Towers - Crisis Dungeons - Criterion Dungeons - Quests - Story
Inventory Collection - Gear - Home Wallpapers - Items - Materia - Memoria - Ultimate Weapons - Weapons
Mechanics Achievements - Abilities - Badges - Expeditions - Gacha - Guilds - Instant Items - Limit Break - Missions - Overspeed - Rare enemies - Roles - Sigils - Statstream - Statuses
Summons Ifrit - Shiva - Ramuh - Bahamut - Ifrit & Bahamut - Leviathan - Shiva & Ramuh - Titan - Odin - Leviathan & Bahamut
Enemies Enemies - Enemy abilities
